picks.reason: Eaton's Mobility business combining into Dana via ~$10B+ Reverse Morris Trust deal announced this morning; combined co ~$11B sales, $250M run-rate synergies, Dana raised 2030 targets to $14-15B sales / 18% EBITDA. Acquirer-of-assets pop on a named, dated M&A catalyst.

Other side of the Dana/Eaton mobility merger: Eaton divests non-core Mobility unit (Reverse Morris Trust, Eaton holders keep 50.1% of combined co), framed as advancing its 2030 growth strategy. Modest positive; large-cap so deal is a small pct of EV.

Beat Q4 revenue and posted record AI/cloud backlog but guided $55.7B capex (over its own $50B guide) and plans to raise ~$40B debt/equity in 2027 incl a $20B ATM dilution; stock -9pct to -12pct premarket. Capex/dilution shock outweighs the beat. Reddit mention surge (rank 24->2) is on a FALLER; StockTwits crowd 90pct bull = contrarian dip-buying.
Filed a 424B5 (registered prospectus / offering) at 06:01 plus an 8-K this morning = equity dilution. Classic offering fade; StockTwits 100pct bull (n=11) is contrarian crowd buying the dip.
Reported Q1 FY27 at 08:00 ET; was trading -3.8pct into the print and diverging weak from its leather/accessories peer cohort. Named dated catalyst but soft, low-conviction directional lean.

Reported Q1 FY27 this morning (Street expected a ~$0.93 loss); also a Reddit mention surge (rank 47). Earnings-day gappy, direction unclear, StockTwits split 60pct bull. Logged for measurement, no confident call.
Reported Q1 June 9 (EPS beat); today's 8-K is a follow-up filing. Footwear peers up 3-4pct but the earnings catalyst is 2 days stale, so no fresh-today directional call. Logged for measurement.

The Alphabet AI-chip order catalyst was June 8-9 (already ran +8-11pct); no fresh news today, premarket RVOL 0.17, StockTwits split 56pct. Momentum-only, capped at signal 0.
